commit_title: Plot total and individual Gaussian fits
commit_message: Rename the main fit trace to "Total Fit" and adjust its styling, and add plotting of individual Gaussian components when more than one component is present. Each component trace computes the scaled PDF across the x-range (scaled by count * binSize to match the histogram), is added as a separate scatter line with a dotted style and a label showing its index and weight percentage. This makes it easier to visualize the total fit alongside its component contributions.
